allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); mlb=d['brands']['MLB']; print\('할인율_대리상:', mlb['dealer']\); print\('할인율_직영:', mlb['direct']\)")

Bash(python -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('=== dealer rows ==='\) for r in \(d.get\('dealer'\) or {}\).get\('rows', []\): if r.get\('isTotal'\): print\('매출합계:', r['monthly']\) print\('=== hq rows ==='\) for r in \(d.get\('hq'\) or {}\).get\('rows', []\): if r.get\('isTotal'\): print\('매출합계:', r['monthly']\) ")
